creator: redrat@mail.ru
text:
Hello, Josh!
On November, 05 2013 at 10:11 you wrote to bug-followup@FreeBSD.org:

 JP> I don't see this port ever having an update to 9.5.5.1 that 
 JP> was reverted. What revision are you thinking was reverted?

It seems I was wrong when wrote that "port have been updated".
Maybe I looked at local ports tree which was already patched
manually. Sorry for misconception.

 JP> The download link in the patch doesn't seem to work without 
 JP> being an LSI partner and logging in.

No, you can download this software without any registration on
LSI site, but it may ask you to accept a "Download Agreement".

If it a showstopper, then this PR may be closed finally.

-- 
WBR, Alexey Markov.
